name: Top2Vec (Topic and Word Vector Modeling)

performance.notes: doc2vec training or API embedding call; UMAP + HDBSCAN clustering; fast after training

agent_readiness.notes: Topic modeling and semantic search via joint document/word embeddings. Automatically finds number of topics (no need to specify K). Embedding backends: doc2vec (local), sentence-transformers, USE (Universal Sentence Encoder). Topics represented as dense word vectors — semantic search within topics. Hierarchical topic reduction. Search by query, topic, or document. Simpler than BERTopic but less flexible. Good for smaller corpora.

gotchas: Topic count determined automatically — can be too many/few
UMAP non-determinism means different topic structures across runs
Smaller model zoo compared to BERTopic's modular backends
best_when: When you don't know how many topics to expect
Semantic document search within topic clusters
Smaller corpora (< 100k documents) needing simple topic analysis
Quick topic discovery without hyperparameter tuning
avoid_when: When BERTopic's modular pipeline is needed
summary: Top2Vec discovers topics by jointly embedding documents and words using doc2vec or sentence-transformers, then clustering with UMAP+HDBSCAN. Automatically finds topic count. Semantic search within topics by query. Hierarchical topic reduction. Simpler than BERTopic but less flexible. Best for smaller corpora needing automatic topic discovery with built-in semantic search.
